title: cremastosperma polyphlebum
intro: Cremastosperma polyphlebum is a species of plant in the Annonaceae family, commonly known as the Annatto tree due to its bright orange seeds, which have been used for centuries as a natural dye. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cremastosperma polyphlebum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant are typically dried and used as a natural dye or infused in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
